dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9026 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 80 Atlantic Avenue in Oceanside, New York, as the “Detective Luis G. Alvarez Post Office”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Gillen (for herself, Mr. Garbarino, Mr. Suozzi, Mr. LaLota, Mr. Torres of New York, Mr. Lawler, Mr. Mannion, Ms. Tenney, Ms. Meng, Ms. Malliotakis, Mr. Kennedy of New York, Mr. Jeffries, Mr. Latimer, Mr. Riley of New York, Mr. Morelle, Mr. Goldman of New York, Ms. Stefanik, Mr. Langworthy, Ms. Clarke of New York, and Ms. Ocasio-Cortez) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 80 Atlantic Avenue in Oceanside, New York, as the Detective Luis G. Alvarez Post Office.

section.header: Detective Luis G. Alvarez Post Office

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 80 Atlantic Avenue in Oceanside, New York, shall be known and designated as the Detective Luis G. Alvarez Post Office.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Detective Luis G. Alvarez Post Office.
